title: Tippy
description: A mod that allow you to add a tip.But go beyond a tip.
body:
# Tippy
![Tips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p4ftpLdI/images/cc30a7c993b1db24a05964ee3c39ed3f54987568.png)
## Description

A mod that allow you to add some tips for your modpack.  
Not only can you change the content & title color, but this can also change the tips' cycle duration itself.   
Click [Wiki](https://github.com/song682/Tippy/wiki) for more info.   
This mod is initially for patching [Loading Tips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loading-tips) mod aren't compatible with the original [Waila](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila) & [Wawla](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wawla) (and I found that I'm not good at patching someone's mod, so, I rewrite it.).    

## Dependency
__[UniMixins](https://github.com/LegacyModdingMC/UniMixins) & [CodeChicken Core U](https://modrinth.com/mod/codechickencore-unofficial)__    
More Specifically, it's UniMix + MixinExtra + CCCU

## Special Thanks

[AmarokIce](https://modrinth.com/user/AmarokIce) helped to fix the mixin problem.
